theme_and_archetype.description: A high-clarity, professional aesthetic engineered for trust and data density, but injected with vibrant Gen-Z energy. Essential for a platform bridging academia and the job market. It rejects the 'boring corporate job board' look in favor of sharp, functional brutalism mixed with highly approachable rounded UI elements.

rtl_guidelines.critical_note: Tamkeen is Arabic-first. React Native 'flexDirection: row' automatically mirrors in RTL mode if I18nManager is configured. Do NOT hardcode 'left' or 'right' margins/paddings if possible; use 'marginStart' and 'marginEnd'.
rtl_guidelines.reading_pattern: F-shaped from top-right. Primary content aligns right.
rtl_guidelines.icons: Directional icons (arrows, chevrons) MUST be mirrored. Back button must point right.
rtl_guidelines.text_alignment: textAlign: 'left' usually maps to the writing direction, but explicitly use 'auto' or 'right' when forcing alignment.

image_urls.description: 3D minimalist illustration of a friendly AI mentor glowing warmly. Use for 'AI Mentor' intro screen or academy module.
Abstract 3D geometric shapes representing career growth. Use for Job Listings empty state, header background, or competency test success screen.
Modern office space. Use as a placeholder for Company Profile header images or Job Listing banners.
Modern hallway. Use as additional employer branding image.

testing.note: React Native uses 'testID' instead of 'data-testid'. ALL interactive elements must have a semantic testID (e.g., 'login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the Tamkeen app using Expo (React Native).
Ensure I18nManager is configured for RTL (forceRTL: true) so flex-row naturally handles Arabic layouts.
Use standard StyleSheet or styled-components/NativeWind reflecting the spacing and color tokens defined here.
DO NOT use generic teal/purple; strictly adhere to the Cobalt Blue (#0033CC) and Signal Orange (#FF5A36) palette.
Ensure text scaling is appropriate for Arabic fonts (Cairo for headers, Tajawal for body). If custom fonts cannot be loaded easily, use standard system fonts but maintain the weight hierarchy.

For the student dashboard, implement a 'bento grid' style layout where different widgets (AI mentor, test scores, job recommendations) are distinct, soft-shadowed white cards on the #FAFAFA background.
Apply testID to all interactable UI elements for testing.
